worker_processes  auto;

pid        /var/run/nginx.pid;

events {
    worker_connections  4096;
}

http {
    include       /etc/nginx/mime.types;
    default_type  application/octet-stream;

    log_format  main  '$remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] "$request" '
                      '$status $body_bytes_sent "$http_referer" '
                      '"$http_user_agent" "$http_x_forwarded_for"';

    access_log  /var/log/nginx/access.log  main;
    sendfile        on;
    keepalive_timeout  65;

    # include /etc/nginx/conf.d/*.conf;

    upstream minio {
        server minio1:9000;
    }

    upstream console {
        ip_hash;
        server minio1:9001;
    }

    server {
        listen       9000;
        listen  [::]:9000;
        server_name  localhost;

        # To allow special characters in headers
        ignore_invalid_headers off;
        # Allow any size file to be uploaded.
        # Set to a value such as 1000m; to restrict file size to a specific value
        client_max_body_size 0;
        # To disable buffering
        proxy_buffering off;
        proxy_request_buffering off;

        location / {
            proxy_set_header Host $http_host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;

            proxy_connect_timeout 300;
            # Default is HTTP/1, keepalive is only enabled in HTTP/1.1
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Connection "";
            chunked_transfer_encoding off;

            proxy_pass http://minio;
        }
    }

    server {
        listen       9001;
        listen  [::]:9001;
        server_name  localhost;

        # To allow special characters in headers
        ignore_invalid_headers off;
        # Allow any size file to be uploaded.
        # Set to a value such as 1000m; to restrict file size to a specific value
        client_max_body_size 0;
        # To disable buffering
        proxy_buffering off;
        proxy_request_buffering off;

        location / {
            proxy_set_header Host $http_host;
            proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
            proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
            proxy_set_header X-NginX-Proxy true;

            # This is necessary to pass the correct IP to be hashed
            real_ip_header X-Real-IP;

            proxy_connect_timeout 300;
            
            # To support websocket
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
            proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
            
            chunked_transfer_encoding off;

            proxy_pass http://console;
        }
    }
}

FILE: expired/register_algos.py

from uav_pipeline.stages.stabilization.tools.detectors import HarrisDetector, SIFTDetector
from uav_pipeline.stages.stabilization.tools.matchers import BFMatcher, FLANNMatcher
from uav_pipeline.core.algo_registry import algo_registry

def register_algos():
    algo_registry.register("harris", HarrisDetector)
    algo_registry.register("sift", SIFTDetector)
    algo_registry.register("bf", BFMatcher)
    algo_registry.register("flann", FLANNMatcher)


================================================
FILE: expired/tools/detectors.py
================================================
import cv2 as cv
import numpy as np
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod

class BaseDetector(ABC):
    # def __init__(self, cfg: dict = None):
    #     self.cfg = cfg or {}

    @abstractmethod
    def detect(self, frame):
        """return keypoints 和 descriptors"""
        pass


# ---------------- Harris ----------------
class HarrisDetector(BaseDetector):
    def __init__(self, 
                #  downsample_ratio, 
                 harris_response_thresh,
                 blockSize,
                 ksize,
                 k
                 ):
        self.downsample_ratio = downsample_ratio
        self.harris_response_thresh = harris_response_thresh
        self.blockSize = blockSize
        self.ksize = ksize
        self.k = k

        
    def detect(self, frame, mask=None):
        

        # 降采样 + 灰度化
        h, w = frame.shape[:2]
        new_w, new_h = int(w * self.downsample_ratio), int(h * self.downsample_ratio)
        frame_gray = cv.cvtColor(cv.resize(frame, (new_w, new_h)), cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)

        # Harris响应
        dst = cv.cornerHarris(frame_gray, blockSize=2, ksize=3, k=0.04)
        thresh = self.harris_response_thresh * dst.max()
        corners_yx = np.argwhere(dst > thresh)

        # 转成KeyPoint
        kp_list = [cv.KeyPoint(float(x), float(y), 31, -1) for y, x in corners_yx]

        # ORB描述符
        if kp_list:
            kp_list, des = cv.ORB_create().compute(frame_gray, kp_list)
        else:
            des = None
        return kp_list, des


# ---------------- SIFT ----------------
class SIFTDetector(BaseDetector):
    def detect(self, frame):
        """SIFT detector + des"""
        downsample_ratio = self.cfg.get("downsample_ratio", 1.0)  # no downsample
        n_features = self.cfg.get("n_features", 500)               # 500 features
        contrast_threshold = self.cfg.get("contrast_threshold", 0.04)
        edge_threshold = self.cfg.get("edge_threshold", 10)
        sigma = self.cfg.get("sigma", 1.6)

        
        h, w = frame.shape[:2]
        new_w, new_h = int(w * downsample_ratio), int(h * downsample_ratio)
        frame_gray = cv.cvtColor(cv.resize(frame, (new_w, new_h)), cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)

        
        sift = cv.SIFT_create(
            nfeatures=n_features,
            contrastThreshold=contrast_threshold,
            edgeThreshold=edge_threshold,
            sigma=sigma
        )
        kp_list, des = sift.detectAndCompute(frame_gray, mask=None)

        return kp_list, des


================================================
FILE: expired/tools/geometry.py
================================================
import numpy as np
import cv2 as cv

def compute_homography(kp1, kp2, matches, ransac_thresh=5.0, max_iter=5000, confidence=0.999):
    if len(matches) < 4:
        return np.eye(3), 0
    pts1 = np.float32([kp1[m.queryIdx].pt for m in matches]).reshape(-1,1,2)
    pts2 = np.float32([kp2[m.trainIdx].pt for m in matches]).reshape(-1,1,2)
    H, mask = cv.findHomography(pts2, pts1, cv.USAC_MAGSAC, ransac_thresh, maxIters=max_iter, confidence=confidence)
    inliers = np.count_nonzero(mask) if mask is not None else 0
    return H if H is not None else np.eye(3), inliers


================================================
FILE: expired/tools/matchers.py
================================================
import cv2 as cv

class BaseMatcher:
    def match(self, des1, des2):
        raise NotImplementedError

class BFMatcher(BaseMatcher):
    def __init__(self, norm_type=cv.NORM_HAMMING, crossCheck=False):
        self.matcher = cv.BFMatcher(norm_type, crossCheck=crossCheck)

    def match(self, des1, des2):
        if des1 is None or des2 is None:
            return []
        matches = self.matcher.knnMatch(des1, des2, k=2)
        # ratio test
        good = [m for m, n in matches if m.distance < 0.8 * n.distance]
        return good

class FLANNMatcher(BaseMatcher):
    def __init__(self):
        index_params = dict(algorithm=1, trees=5)
        search_params = dict(checks=50)
        self.matcher = cv.FlannBasedMatcher(index_params, search_params)

    def match(self, des1, des2):
        if des1 is None or des2 is None:
            return []
        matches = self.matcher.knnMatch(des1, des2, k=2)
        good = [m for m, n in matches if m.distance < 0.8 * n.distance]
        return good

FILE: nds_code/Scenario_format_muli.py
================================================
import pandas as pd
import os
import psutil
import concurrent.futures
import multiprocessing
import time
from typing import Optional
import argparse
import gc
import threading

# ---------------------- 全局配置优化（预加载+精简） ----------------------
# 禁用pandas无关警告，减少输出开销
pd.options.mode.chained_assignment = None  # default='warn'
pd.options.display.max_columns = None

# IO信号量：限制同时读写的文件数，避免磁盘IO瓶颈（可根据磁盘性能调整）
IO_SEMAPHORE = threading.Semaphore(10)

CLASS_MAP = {
    0: 'bicycle', 1: 'bus', 2: 'car', 3: 'engineering_vehicle',
    4: 'motorcycle', 5: 'truck', 6: 'blade_lifting_truck',
    7: 'pedestrian', 8: 'trailer'
}
COL_RENAME_MAP = {
    'track_id': 'id', 'xPosition_meter': 'xPosition', 'yPosition_meter': 'yPosition',
    'width_meter': 'width', 'height_meter': 'height', 'xVelocity_meter_per_s': 'xVelocity',
    'yVelocity_meter_per_s': 'yVelocity', 'xAcceleration_meter_per_s2': 'xAcceleration',
    'yAcceleration_meter_per_s2': 'yAcceleration', 'angle_degree_smooth': 'heading',
    'angular_velocity': 'yaw_rate', 'DHW_meter': 'DHW', 'THW_s': 'THW',
    'TTC_s': 'TTC', 'class_pred': 'class'
}
# 需删除的列（直接指定，避免无效过滤导致漏删）
COLS_TO_DROP = [
    'xPosition_pixel', 'yPosition_pixel', 'width_pixel', 'height_pixel',
    'angle_degree', 'angle_degree_denoised', 'angle_degree_filter',
    'angular_acceleration', 'velocity_magnitude', 'velocity_direction_rad'
]
PROCESS_SHEETS = ['ego_veh', 'traffic_veh']
KEEP_SHEETS = ['Feature']
ALL_TARGET_SHEETS = PROCESS_SHEETS + KEEP_SHEETS

# ---------------------- 工具函数优化（稳定优先） ----------------------
def find_xlsx_files(root_directory: str) -> list:
    """
    优化：换回os.walk，避免递归scandir句柄泄漏，提升大规模文件扫描稳定性
    """
    print(f"🔍 正在扫描路径: {root_directory}")
    if not os.path.exists(root_directory):
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"路径不存在: {root_directory}")
    if not os.path.isdir(root_directory):
        raise NotADirectoryError(f"路径不是文件夹: {root_directory}")
    
    xlsx_files = []
    for dirpath, _, filenames in os.walk(root_directory):
        for filename in filenames:
            if filename.endswith('Event1.xlsx'):
                # 启用已处理文件跳过（避免重复劳动，核心提速点）
                formal_file = f"{os.path.splitext(filename)[0]}_formal.xlsx"
                # formal_file_path = os.path.join(dirpath, formal_file)
                # if not os.path.exists(formal_file_path):
                xlsx_files.append(os.path.join(dirpath, filename))
    
    print(f"✅ 扫描完成，找到 {len(xlsx_files)} 个待处理.xlsx文件")
    if 0 < len(xlsx_files) <= 10:
        print(f"📋 待处理文件列表: {xlsx_files}")
    return xlsx_files

def get_optimal_workers(target_cpu_usage: float = 0.8) -> int:
    """
    优化：针对160核超大规模核心，限制最大进程数80，避免资源过载
    """
    logical_cores = multiprocessing.cpu_count()
    # 超核心场景：预留10%核心给系统，进程数上限80
    reserve_cores = int(logical_cores * 0.1)
    optimal_workers = max(1, min(
        80,  # 限制最大进程数，避免卡死
        logical_cores - reserve_cores,
        int(logical_cores * target_cpu_usage)
    ))
    print(f"⚙️  硬件信息：物理CPU数={psutil.cpu_count(logical=False)}, 逻辑核心数={logical_cores}")
    print(f"⚙️  最优进程数: {optimal_workers}（预留{reserve_cores}个核心给系统）")
    return optimal_workers

def sort_files_by_size(file_list: list) -> list:
    """
    优化：按文件大小降序排序，大文件优先处理（避免负载不均衡）
    """
    try:
        file_with_size = [(fp, os.path.getsize(fp)) for fp in file_list]
        # 降序排序，大文件先处理
        file_with_size.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
        sorted_files = [fp for fp, _ in file_with_size]
        print(f"✅ 文件按大小排序完成，最大文件大小: {file_with_size[0][1]/1024/1024:.2f} MB")
        return sorted_files
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️  文件排序失败，使用原顺序: {str(e)}")
        return file_list

# ---------------------- 核心处理函数（移除所有分块逻辑，简洁高效） ----------------------
def process_single_sheet(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    精简：完整处理DataFrame，无需分块
    """
    # 分类映射：replace比map在大数据量下快20%-50%
    if 'class_pred' in df.columns:
        df['class_pred'] = df['class_pred'].replace(CLASS_MAP)
    # 列重命名：只对存在的列进行重命名（减少无效遍历）
    existing_rename_cols = {k: v for k, v in COL_RENAME_MAP.items() if k in df.columns}
    df = df.rename(columns=existing_rename_cols)
    # 列删除：只删除存在的列（避免errors='ignore'的额外开销）
    existing_drop_cols = [col for col in COLS_TO_DROP if col in df.columns]
    if existing_drop_cols:
        df = df.drop(columns=existing_drop_cols)
    return df

def process_single_file(file_path: str) -> bool:
    """
    精简：移除所有分块相关逻辑，直接完整读取/处理/写入
    优化：
    1. 移除chunksize、read_only等兼容问题参数
    2. 限制并发IO，避免磁盘瓶颈
    3. 优化内存回收，保证稳定性
    """
    with IO_SEMAPHORE:  # 限制并发IO，缓解磁盘压力
        try:
            processed_sheets = {}
            # 仅指定引擎，无多余参数，兼容所有版本
            with pd.ExcelFile(file_path, engine='openpyxl') as xl:
                # 处理需要加工的sheet：完整读取+完整处理
                for sheet in PROCESS_SHEETS:
                    if sheet in xl.sheet_names:
                        try:
                            # 完整读取sheet（无兼容问题）
                            full_df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=sheet, engine='openpyxl')
                            # 完整处理DataFrame
                            processed_df = process_single_sheet(full_df)
                            processed_sheets[sheet] = processed_df
                            del full_df, processed_df  # 释放内存
                        except Exception as sheet_e:
                            raise Exception(f"处理sheet {sheet} 失败: {str(sheet_e)}")
                
                # 保留无需加工的sheet：直接完整读取
                for sheet in KEEP_SHEETS:
                    if sheet in xl.sheet_names:
                        df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=sheet, engine='openpyxl')
                        processed_sheets[sheet] = df
                        del df  # 释放内存
            
            # 写入处理后的文件（使用openpyxl引擎，提升稳定性）
            if processed_sheets:
                dir_path = os.path.dirname(file_path)
                file_name = os.path.basename(file_path)
                processed_file = f"{os.path.splitext(file_name)[0]}_formal.xlsx"
                processed_path = os.path.join(dir_path, processed_file)
                
                with pd.ExcelWriter(processed_path, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
                    for sheet_name, df in processed_sheets.items():
                        df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=sheet_name, index=False)
                        del df  # 释放内存
                
                print(f"✅ 处理成功: {processed_path}")
                del processed_sheets  # 释放内存
            
            gc.collect()  # 统一回收内存
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"❌ 处理文件失败 {file_path}: {str(e)}")
            return False

# ---------------------- 分批多进程调度（核心：避免一次性任务过载） ----------------------
def batch_process_files(
    file_list: list,
    batch_size: int = 500,
    target_cpu_usage: float = 0.8,
    max_workers: Optional[int] = None
) -> None:
    """
    分批处理文件，每批次后重启进程池，避免内存泄漏和任务过载
    精简：移除chunk_size参数（无需分块）
    """
    # 分割文件列表为多个批次
    file_batches = [
        file_list[i:i+batch_size]
        for i in range(0, len(file_list), batch_size)
    ]
    print(f"📦 将{len(file_list)}个文件分为{len(file_batches)}个批次处理，每批次{batch_size}个文件")
    
    # 逐批次处理
    total_processed = 0
    for batch_idx, file_batch in enumerate(file_batches):
        print(f"🔄 开始处理第{batch_idx+1}/{len(file_batches)}批次")
        # 每批次获取进程数
        if max_workers is None:
            batch_worker = get_optimal_workers(target_cpu_usage)
        else:
            batch_worker = min(max_workers, multiprocessing.cpu_count())
        
        # 每批次创建新进程池，自动释放上一批次资源
        with concurrent.futures.ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=batch_worker) as executor:
            future_to_file = {
                executor.submit(process_single_file, fp): fp
                for fp in file_batch
            }
            # 异步获取结果
            for future in concurrent.futures.as_completed(future_to_file):
                try:
                    future.result()
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"❌ 第{batch_idx+1}批次任务执行失败: {str(e)}")
                finally:
                    total_processed += 1
        
        # 批次完成后：强制回收内存+短暂休眠，缓解IO压力
        gc.collect()
        time.sleep(1)
        print(f"✅ 第{batch_idx+1}批次处理完成，累计处理{total_processed}/{len(file_list)}个文件")

# ---------------------- 命令行参数配置 ----------------------
def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="160核双CPU精简稳定版Excel文件批量处理器")
    parser.add_argument("--root_dir", type=str, default="/home/stu7/cys/code/temp/t_03/site4_process/outputdir_site4/ADS_4_4/",
                        help="待扫描的根目录路径")
    parser.add_argument("--cpu_usage", type=float, default=0.8,
                        help="目标CPU占用率（160核建议0.7-0.8）")
    parser.add_argument("--workers", type=int, default=None,
                        help="手动指定进程数（不指定则自动适配，建议60-80）")
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=500,
                        help="每批次处理文件数量（建议300-500）")
    return parser.parse_args()

# ---------------------- 主函数（整合所有逻辑） ----------------------
if __name__ == "__main__":
    args = parse_args()

    try:
        print("📌 160核双CPU精简稳定版Excel处理程序启动")
        # 1. 扫描待处理文件
        xlsx_files = find_xlsx_files(args.root_dir)
        if not xlsx_files:
            print("⚠️  未找到任何待处理的.xlsx文件")
            exit(0)
        
        # 2. 文件按大小排序（负载均衡）
        sorted_xlsx_files = sort_files_by_size(xlsx_files)
        
        # 3. 分批多进程处理（移除chunk_size参数）
        batch_process_files(
            file_list=sorted_xlsx_files,
            batch_size=args.batch_size,
            target_cpu_usage=args.cpu_usage,
            max_workers=args.workers
        )
        
        print("🎉 所有待处理文件处理完成（精简稳定版）")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"💥 程序执行出错: {str(e)}")
        exit(1)

# 检查文件是否存在
import os
import shutil
import yaml
def check_file_exists(file_path):
    import os
    return os.path.isfile(file_path)

def check_clear_path(path,clear = False):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        # pass
        if clear: 
            shutil.rmtree(path)  # 清空文件夹
            os.makedirs(path) 
        else:
            pass
    else:
        os.makedirs(path)    # 创建文件夹
def load_config(config_path):
    with open(config_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as file:
        config = yaml.safe_load(file)
    
    # 规范化路径
    if 'video_dir' in config:
        config['video_dir'] = os.path.normpath(config['video_dir'])
    if 'MODEL_PATH' in config:
        config['MODEL_PATH'] = os.path.normpath(config['MODEL_PATH'])
    if 'output_dir' in config:
        config['output_dir'] = os.path.normpath(config['output_dir'])
    if 'raw_tracks_folder' in config:
        config['raw_tracks_folder'] = os.path.normpath(config['raw_tracks_folder'])
    return config

# 检查文件是否存在
import os
import shutil
import yaml
def check_file_exists(file_path):
    import os
    return os.path.isfile(file_path)

def check_clear_path(path,clear = False):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        # pass
        if clear: 
            shutil.rmtree(path)  # 清空文件夹
            os.makedirs(path) 
        else:
            pass
    else:
        os.makedirs(path)    # 创建文件夹
def load_config(config_path):
    with open(config_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as file:
        config = yaml.safe_load(file)
    
    # 规范化路径
    if 'video_dir' in config:
        config['video_dir'] = os.path.normpath(config['video_dir'])
    if 'MODEL_PATH' in config:
        config['MODEL_PATH'] = os.path.normpath(config['MODEL_PATH'])
    if 'output_dir' in config:
        config['output_dir'] = os.path.normpath(config['output_dir'])
    if 'raw_tracks_folder' in config:
        config['raw_tracks_folder'] = os.path.normpath(config['raw_tracks_folder'])
    return config

import cv2 as cv
import numpy as np


def harris_corner_detect(
    img_gray, 
    mask=None,
    blockSize=2,    # Harris检测的邻域大小（默认2）
    ksize=3,        # Sobel算子核大小（默认3，必须为奇数）
    k=0.04,         # Harris响应值计算参数（默认0.04，范围0.04~0.06）
    response_thresh=0.07  # 角点响应值阈值（默认0.01，越小检测越多角点）case8:0.01  case7:0.07
):
    """
    极简版Harris角点检测（仅保留核心逻辑，无任何额外优化）
    参数：
        img_gray: 输入灰度图像（np.ndarray，单通道）
        blockSize: Harris检测的邻域大小
        ksize: Sobel算子核大小（奇数）
        k: Harris响应值计算参数
        response_thresh: 角点筛选阈值（响应值 > thresh*max_response 才视为角点）
    返回：
        kp_list: 检测到的角点列表（cv2.KeyPoint对象）
    """
    # 1. 核心：计算Harris响应值（float32格式）
    dst = cv.cornerHarris(img_gray, blockSize, ksize, k)
    
    # 2. 筛选高响应值角点（仅保留超过阈值的角点）
    # 阈值 = 响应值最大值 * 比例系数
    thresh = response_thresh * dst.max()
    # 找到所有满足条件的角点坐标（格式：(y, x)）
    corners_yx = np.argwhere(dst > thresh)
    
    # 3. 转换为cv2.KeyPoint格式（适配后续描述符提取）
    kp_list = []
    for y, x in corners_yx:
        # KeyPoint参数：x坐标、y坐标、邻域大小（设为31，兼容ORB默认值）、角度（-1表示无方向）
        kp = cv.KeyPoint(
            x=float(x),
            y=float(y),
            size=31,  # 仅为适配后续ORB描述符，无实际Harris尺度含义
            angle=-1  # Harris无方向信息，固定设为-1
        )
        kp_list.append(kp)
    
    # 掩码处理
    if mask is not None:
        filtered_kp = []
        for kp in kp_list:
            x, y = int(kp.pt[0]), int(kp.pt[1])
            # 检查坐标是否在图像范围内
            if 0 <= y < mask.shape[0] and 0 <= x < mask.shape[1]:
                if mask[y, x] == 255:
                    filtered_kp.append(kp)
        return filtered_kp
    else:
        return kp_list

def image_mask(mask_img_path, width, height):
    """根据图片获取掩码：读取黑白掩码jpg图片，提取白色区域作为稳定区域的二值掩码"""
    mask_img = cv.imread(mask_img_path)
    if mask_img is None:
        print("警告：未传入掩码，将使用全图进行稳定化")
        mask_img = np.ones((height, width), dtype=np.uint8) * 255  # 全图掩码
    
    # 转换为灰度图
    gray_mask = cv.cvtColor(mask_img, cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    
    # 二值化：白色区域（灰度值接近255）设为255，其他设为0（确保只有白色区域有效）
    _, binary_mask = cv.threshold(gray_mask, 240, 255, cv.THRESH_BINARY)
    mask = binary_mask.astype(np.uint8)
    
    return mask

def downsample_frame(frame, downsample_ratio):
    """降分辨率函数"""
    if downsample_ratio == 1.0:
        return frame.copy()
    h, w = frame.shape[:2]
    new_w = int(w * downsample_ratio)
    new_h = int(h * downsample_ratio)
    down_frame = cv.resize(frame, (new_w, new_h), interpolation=cv.INTER_AREA)
    return down_frame

def match_features(des1, des2, matcher, filter_ratio):
    """特征匹配（默认BF方案，比率测试0.9）"""
    matches = matcher.knnMatch(des1, des2, k=2)
    good_matches = []
    for m, n in matches:
        if m.distance < filter_ratio * n.distance:
            good_matches.append(m)
    return good_matches
    
def compute_transform(kp1, kp2, matches, ransac_method, ransac_reproj_thresh, ransac_max_iter, ransac_confidence):
    """计算变换矩阵（固定透视变换+MAGSAC++），新增返回内点数量"""
    inliers_count = 0  # 初始化内点数量
    if len(matches) < 4:
        return np.eye(3), inliers_count
    
    pts1 = np.float32([kp1[m.queryIdx].pt for m in matches]).reshape(-1, 1, 2)
    pts2 = np.float32([kp2[m.trainIdx].pt for m in matches]).reshape(-1, 1, 2)
    H, inlier_mask = cv.findHomography(
        pts2, pts1,
        method=ransac_method,
        ransacReprojThreshold=ransac_reproj_thresh,
        maxIters=ransac_max_iter,
        confidence=ransac_confidence
    )
    
    # 统计内点数量
    if inlier_mask is not None:
        inliers_count = np.count_nonzero(inlier_mask)
    
    H = H if H is not None else np.eye(3)
    return H, inliers_count

def scale_homography_matrix(H, downsample_ratio):
    """缩放透视变换矩阵到原分辨率"""
    if downsample_ratio == 1.0:
        return H
    
    # 缩放矩阵：先放大坐标，再应用变换，再缩小（逆过程）
    # 构造缩放矩阵
    scale = 1.0 / downsample_ratio
    # 缩放矩阵 M = [[scale, 0, 0], [0, scale, 0], [0, 0, 1]]
    M_scale = np.array([
        [scale, 0, 0],
        [0, scale, 0],
        [0, 0, 1]
    ], dtype=np.float32)
    # 逆缩放矩阵
    M_inv_scale = np.array([
        [downsample_ratio, 0, 0],
        [0, downsample_ratio, 0],
        [0, 0, 1]
    ], dtype=np.float32)
    
    # 变换矩阵组合：M_scale * H * M_inv_scale
    H_scaled = M_scale @ H @ M_inv_scale
    return H_scaled

def analyze_homography(H):
    # 分解平移分量
    tx, ty = H[0, 2], H[1, 2]
    
    # 分解旋转和缩放分量（通过前两列的子矩阵）
    R = H[:2, :2]
    # 计算缩放因子（奇异值分解）
    scales = np.linalg.svd(R, compute_uv=False)
    scale_x, scale_y = scales[0], scales[1]
    
    # 透视分量（最后一行前两个元素）
    perspective_x, perspective_y = H[2, 0], H[2, 1]
    return tx, ty, scale_x, scale_y, perspective_x, perspective_y
    # print(f"平移: tx={tx:.2f}, ty={ty:.2f}")
    # print(f"缩放: sx={scale_x:.2f}, sy={scale_y:.2f}")
    # print(f"透视分量: px={perspective_x:.4f}, py={perspective_y:.4f}")
def resize_frame(frame, target_resolution):
    mapping = {
        "4k": (3840, 2160),
        "2k": (2560, 1440),
        "1080p": (1920, 1080)
    }
    if target_resolution in mapping:
        return cv.resize(frame, mapping[target_resolution])

def optical_lk(frame_gray,prev_frame_gray,feature_params):

    prev_corners = cv.goodFeaturesToTrack(prev_frame_gray, mask=None, **feature_params)


    next_corners, st, err = cv.calcOpticalFlowPyrLK(prev_frame_gray, frame_gray, prev_corners, None)

    # 筛选匹配良好的点
    good_new = next_corners[st == 1]
    good_old = prev_corners[st == 1]


    # transform, _ = cv.estimateAffinePartial2D(good_new, good_old, method=cv.RANSAC)
    transform,mask = cv.findHomography(good_new, good_old, cv.RANSAC, 5.0)
    # 应用仿射变换进行对齐
    return transform

def preprocess_frame(frame, downsample_ratio):
    """优化：帧预处理（先降分辨率，再转灰度）"""
    frame_down = downsample_frame(frame, downsample_ratio)
    gray = cv.cvtColor(frame_down, cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    return gray

# v2 新增
def read_mask(mask_img_path):
    """
    读取黑白掩码图片，提取白色区域作为稳定区域的二值掩码
    :param mask_image_path: 掩码图片（jpg格式）的路径
    :return: np.uint8类型的二值掩码（白色区域为255，黑色区域为0）
    """
    # 读取掩码图片
    mask_img = cv.imread(mask_img_path)
    if mask_img is None:
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"无法读取掩码图片：{mask_img_path}")
    
    # 转换为灰度图
    gray_mask = cv.cvtColor(mask_img, cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    
    # 二值化：白色区域（灰度值接近255）设为255，其他设为0（确保只有白色区域有效）
    _, binary_mask = cv.threshold(gray_mask, 240, 255, cv.THRESH_BINARY)
    
    # 确保输出为np.uint8类型
    return binary_mask.astype(np.uint8)

def apply_homography_to_video(input_video_path, output_video_path, H):
    """
    将单应性矩阵应用到视频的每一帧
    
    参数:
        input_video_path: 输入视频路径
        output_video_path: 输出视频路径
        H: 单应性矩阵
    """
    cap = cv.VideoCapture(input_video_path)
    if not cap.isOpened():
        print(f"无法打开输入视频: {input_video_path}")
        return
    
    # 获取视频属性
    fps = cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FPS)
    width = int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH))
    height = int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT))
    total_frames = int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT))
    
    # 创建视频写入器
    fourcc = cv.VideoWriter_fourcc(*'mp4v')
    out = cv.VideoWriter(output_video_path, fourcc, fps, (width, height))
    
    if not out.isOpened():
        print(f"无法创建输出视频: {output_video_path}")
        cap.release()
        return
    
    frame_count = 0
    print(f"开始处理视频: {input_video_path}")
    
    while True:
        ret, frame = cap.read()
        if not ret:
            break
        
        # 应用单应性矩阵变换
        if H is not None:
            aligned_frame = cv.warpPerspective(frame, H, (width, height))
        else:
            aligned_frame = frame  # 如果H为None，使用原帧
        
        # 写入输出视频
        out.write(aligned_frame)
        frame_count += 1
        
        if frame_count % 30 == 0:  # 每30帧打印一次进度
            print(f"处理进度: {frame_count}/{total_frames} 帧")
    
    cap.release()
    out.release()
    print(f"视频处理完成: {output_video_path}")
    print(f"总处理帧数: {frame_count}")

def compute_homography(base_image, target_image):
    """
    计算从目标图像到基准图像的单应性矩阵
    
    参数:
        base_image: 基准图像
        target_image: 需要对齐的目标图像
    
    返回:
        H: 单应性矩阵
        good_matches: 良好匹配点数量
    """
    # 初始化特征检测器 - 使用AKAZE
    feature_detector = cv.AKAZE_create()
    
    # 转换为灰度图
    base_gray = cv.cvtColor(base_image, cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    target_gray = cv.cvtColor(target_image, cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    
    # 检测基准图像的特征点和描述符
    kp1, des1 = feature_detector.detectAndCompute(base_gray, None)
    kp2, des2 = feature_detector.detectAndCompute(target_gray, None)
    
    # 使用BFMatcher进行特征匹配
    bf = cv.BFMatcher(cv.NORM_HAMMING, crossCheck=True)
    matches = bf.match(des1, des2)
    
    # 按距离排序，取前80%的良好匹配
    matches = sorted(matches, key=lambda x: x.distance)
    num_good_matches = int(len(matches) * 0.8)
    good_matches = matches[:num_good_matches]
    
    H = None
    # 至少需要4个匹配点才能计算单应性矩阵
    if len(good_matches) >= 4:
        # 提取匹配点的坐标
        src_pts = np.float32([kp1[m.queryIdx].pt for m in good_matches]).reshape(-1, 1, 2)
        dst_pts = np.float32([kp2[m.trainIdx].pt for m in good_matches]).reshape(-1, 1, 2)
        
        # 使用RANSAC算法计算单应性矩阵
        H, mask = cv.findHomography(dst_pts, src_pts, cv.RANSAC, 5.0)
        print(f"成功计算单应性矩阵，良好匹配点: {len(good_matches)}")
    else:
        print(f"计算单应性矩阵失败，匹配点不足。找到 {len(good_matches)} 个匹配点，需要至少4个")
    
    return H, len(good_matches)

def f1(kp, des, mask=None, use_mask=True, use_target_length=True, target_length=8000):
    """高效筛选特征点和描述符"""
    if not kp or des is None:
        return [], None
    if use_mask and mask is None:
        raise ValueError("当use_mask=True时，必须传入有效的mask参数")
    
    kp_coords = np.array([(p.pt[0], p.pt[1]) for p in kp], dtype=np.float32)
    kp_coords_int = np.round(kp_coords).astype(np.int32)
    
    if use_mask:
        height, width = mask.shape[:2]
    else:
        height, width = int(np.max(kp_coords[:, 1])) + 1, int(np.max(kp_coords[:, 0])) + 1
        
    valid_boundary = (kp_coords_int[:, 0] >= 0) & (kp_coords_int[:, 0] < width) & \
                     (kp_coords_int[:, 1] >= 0) & (kp_coords_int[:, 1] < height)
    valid_indices = np.where(valid_boundary)[0]
    
    if use_mask:
        valid_coords = kp_coords_int[valid_boundary]
        valid_mask = mask[valid_coords[:, 1], valid_coords[:, 0]] == 255
        final_indices = valid_indices[valid_mask]
    else:
        final_indices = valid_indices
    
    n = final_indices.shape[0]
    if n == 0:
        return [], None
        
    if target_length >= n and use_target_length:
        selected_indices = final_indices
    else:
        selected_indices = final_indices[np.linspace(0, n - 1, target_length, dtype=int)]
        
    filtered_kp = [kp[i] for i in selected_indices]
    filtered_des = des[selected_indices] if len(selected_indices) > 0 else None
    
    return filtered_kp, filtered_des

def match_perspective(feature_detector, current_frame,ref_frame, stable_mask):
    """
    current_frame: 是需要进行透视变化的当前帧
    ref_frame: 参考帧
    stable_mask: 稳定区域掩码
    return： H: 计算得到的单应性矩阵
          aligned_frame: 透视变换后的对齐帧
          current_des: 当前帧的描述符
          current_kp: 当前帧的关键点
    """
    current_gray = cv.cvtColor(current_frame, cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    ref_gray = cv.cvtColor(ref_frame, cv.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    current_kp_raw, current_des_raw = feature_detector.detectAndCompute(current_gray, None)
    current_kp, current_des = f1(current_kp_raw, current_des_raw, stable_mask)  # 使用图片掩码

    ref_kp_raw, ref_des_raw = feature_detector.detectAndCompute(ref_gray, None)
    ref_kp, ref_des = f1(ref_kp_raw, ref_des_raw, stable_mask)  # 使用图片掩码
    width , height = current_frame.shape[1], current_frame.shape[0]
    aligned_frame = current_frame

    
    if ref_des is not None and current_des is not None:
        bf = cv.BFMatcher(cv.NORM_HAMMING, crossCheck=False)
        matches = sorted(bf.match(ref_des, current_des), key=lambda x: x.distance)
        good_matches = matches[:int(len(matches)*0.8)]
        
        if len(good_matches) >= 4:
            src_pts = np.float32([ref_kp[m.queryIdx].pt for m in good_matches]).reshape(-1, 1, 2)
            dst_pts = np.float32([current_kp[m.trainIdx].pt for m in good_matches]).reshape(-1, 1, 2)
            # 【修改】获取RANSAC掩码，计算内点数量
            H, mask = cv.findHomography(dst_pts, src_pts, cv.RANSAC, 5.0)
            if H is not None:
                aligned_frame = cv.warpPerspective(current_frame, H, (width, height))
                # 【新增3】统计内点数量（mask中1表示内点）
                return H, aligned_frame,current_des,current_kp
    return None, aligned_frame,current_des,current_kp

FILE: nds_code/utils/step2_Tracking/dection_tracking.py

from regex import T
from ultralytics import YOLO
import cv2 as cv
import os
from tqdm import tqdm
from collections import defaultdict
from utils.step2_Tracking.tracking_tools import*
class YOLO_ByteTrack():
    def __init__(self, model_path, st_video_path, tracks_output_path,tracks_video_output_path, visualization = False):
        self.model_path = model_path
        self.st_video_path = st_video_path
        self.tracks_output_path = tracks_output_path
        self.visualization = visualization
        self.tracks_video_output_path = tracks_video_output_path
    def get_tracks(self):
        # 文件存在性检查
        # if os.path.exists(self.tracks_output_path):
        #     print(f"输出文件 {self.tracks_output_path} 已存在，跳过当前视频跟踪")
        #     return
        model = YOLO(self.model_path)
        cap = cv.VideoCapture(self.st_video_path)
        frame_counter = 0
        tracks = []
        track_history = defaultdict(lambda: [])

        if self.visualization:
            out = cv.VideoWriter(
                self.tracks_video_output_path, 
                cv.VideoWriter_fourcc(*'mp4v'), 
                cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FPS), 
                (int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH)), int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT)))
            )

        with tqdm(total=int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT)), desc="Tracking Objects") as pbar:
            while True:
                ret, frame = cap.read()
                if not ret:
                    break
                else:
                    box_info = {}
                    results = model.track(source=frame, persist=True)
                    result_summary = results[0].summary()
                    box_info['frame'] = int(frame_counter)
                    box_info['box_info'] = result_summary
                    tracks.append(box_info)
                    frame_counter += 1
                    if self.visualization:
                        annotated_frame = annotate(
                            results, 
                            track_history, 
                            (int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT)), int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH)))
                        )
                        out.write(annotated_frame)
                    pbar.update(1)
            cap.release()
            if self.visualization:
                out.release()
            list2json(tracks,self.tracks_output_path)
        return tracks

# utils/step2_Tracking/dection_tracking_fast.py
import os
import cv2 as cv
import json
from collections import defaultdict
from sympy import false
from tqdm import tqdm
from ultralytics import YOLO
import numpy as np
# 补充：确保list2json函数存在（如果没有则添加）
def list2json(data, path):
    with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

# 补充：annotate函数（如果没有则添加，适配ultralytics）
def annotate(results,track_history,default_size):
    # Get the boxes and track IDs
    boxes = results[0].obb.xywhr.cpu()
    # track_ids = results[0].obb.id.int().cpu().tolist()
    try:
        track_ids = results[0].obb.id.int().cpu().tolist()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error encountered: {e}")  # 可选：打印错误信息以便调试
        track_ids = []
        boxes = []
    try:
        # Visualize the results on the frame
        annotated_frame = results[0].plot(line_width=2, conf=False, labels = True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error encountered while plotting results: {e}")
        # Create a default black frame with the specified size
        height, width = default_size
        annotated_frame = np.zeros((height, width, 3), dtype=np.uint8)
    # Visualize the results on the frame
    # annotated_frame = results[0].plot(line_width = 2,conf = False)
    # frame_list.append(annotated_frame)
    # Plot the tracks
    if len(track_ids) != 0:
        for box, track_id in zip(boxes, track_ids):
            x, y, w, h,r = box
            track = track_history[track_id]
            track.append((float(x), float(y)))  # x, y center point
            if len(track) > 90:  # retain 90 tracks for 90 frames
                track.pop(0)

            # Draw the tracking lines
            points = np.hstack(track).astype(np.int32).reshape((-1, 1, 2))
            cv.polylines(annotated_frame, [points], isClosed=False, color=(230, 0, 230), thickness=4)
    else:
        pass
    return annotated_frame

class YOLO_ByteTrack():
    # 关键：添加所有传入的参数，并设置默认值（保证向后兼容）
    def __init__(self, 
                 model_path, 
                 st_video_path, 
                 tracks_output_path,
                 tracks_video_output_path, 
                 visualization = False,
                 imgsz=1024,    # 新增
                 conf=0.25,          # 新增
                 iou=0.45,           # 新增
                #  track_thresh=0.5,   # 新增
                FRAME_QUEUE_SIZE=60,  # 80核CPU适配
                BATCH_SIZE=40,  # 新增
                 DEVICE='cpu',       # 新增
                 HALF_PRECISION=False):# 新增
        
        # 原有参数
        self.model_path = model_path
        self.st_video_path = st_video_path
        self.tracks_output_path = tracks_output_path
        self.visualization = visualization
        self.tracks_video_output_path = tracks_video_output_path
        
        # 新增参数（赋值为实例变量）
        self.imgsz = imgsz
        self.conf = conf
        self.iou = iou
        # self.track_thresh = track_thresh
        self.FRAME_QUEUE_SIZE = FRAME_QUEUE_SIZE
        self.BATCH_SIZE = BATCH_SIZE
        self.DEVICE = DEVICE
        self.HALF_PRECISION = HALF_PRECISION

    def get_tracks(self):
        # 文件存在性检查
        # if os.path.exists(self.tracks_output_path):
        #     print(f"输出文件 {self.tracks_output_path} 已存在，跳过当前视频跟踪")
        #     return
        model = YOLO(self.model_path)
        cap = cv.VideoCapture(self.st_video_path)
        frame_counter = 0
        tracks = []
        track_history = defaultdict(lambda: [])

        if self.visualization:
            out = cv.VideoWriter(
                self.tracks_video_output_path, 
                cv.VideoWriter_fourcc(*'mp4v'), 
                cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FPS), 
                (int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH)), int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT)))
            )

        with tqdm(total=int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT)), desc="Tracking Objects") as pbar:
            while True:
                ret, frame = cap.read()
                if not ret:
                    break
                else:
                    box_info = {}
                    results = model.track(source=frame, persist=True, device=self.DEVICE, half=self.HALF_PRECISION,imgsz=self.imgsz,conf=self.conf,iou=self.iou,verbose=False)
                    result_summary = results[0].summary()
                    box_info['frame'] = int(frame_counter)
                    box_info['box_info'] = result_summary
                    tracks.append(box_info)
                    frame_counter += 1
                    if self.visualization:
                        annotated_frame = annotate(
                            results, 
                            track_history, 
                            (int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT)), int(cap.get(cv.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH)))
                        )
                        out.write(annotated_frame)
                    pbar.update(1)
            cap.release()
            if self.visualization:
                out.release()
            list2json(tracks,self.tracks_output_path)
        return tracks

import cv2 as cv
import numpy as np
import json
def annotate(results,track_history,default_size):
    # Get the boxes and track IDs
    boxes = results[0].obb.xywhr.cpu()
    # track_ids = results[0].obb.id.int().cpu().tolist()
    try:
        track_ids = results[0].obb.id.int().cpu().tolist()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error encountered: {e}")  # 可选：打印错误信息以便调试
        track_ids = []
        boxes = []
    try:
        # Visualize the results on the frame
        annotated_frame = results[0].plot(line_width=2, conf=False, labels = True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error encountered while plotting results: {e}")
        # Create a default black frame with the specified size
        height, width = default_size
        annotated_frame = np.zeros((height, width, 3), dtype=np.uint8)
    # Visualize the results on the frame
    # annotated_frame = results[0].plot(line_width = 2,conf = False)
    # frame_list.append(annotated_frame)
    # Plot the tracks
    if len(track_ids) != 0:
        for box, track_id in zip(boxes, track_ids):
            x, y, w, h,r = box
            track = track_history[track_id]
            track.append((float(x), float(y)))  # x, y center point
            if len(track) > 90:  # retain 90 tracks for 90 frames
                track.pop(0)

            # Draw the tracking lines
            points = np.hstack(track).astype(np.int32).reshape((-1, 1, 2))
            cv.polylines(annotated_frame, [points], isClosed=False, color=(230, 0, 230), thickness=4)
    else:
        pass
    return annotated_frame

def list2json(list,json_path):
    with open(json_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as json_file:
        json.dump(list, json_file, indent=4)
    print(f'json save done. {json_path}')

FILE: nds_code/utils/step3_postprocess/postprocess.py

import json
import numpy as np
import cv2 as cv
import math
import os
from tqdm import tqdm
from shapely import length
from utils.step3_postprocess.preprocess_tools import *
from utils.step3_postprocess.postprocess_tools import *
import pandas as pd
from collections import Counter

class position():
    def __init__(self, x, y):
        self.x = x
        self.y = y

    def __eq__(self, other):
        if self.x == other.x and self.y == other.y:
            return True
        else:
            return False
    
    def __str__(self):
        return f"({self.x}, {self.y})"

# 独立的Vertex_points类（修复数据类型问题）
class Vertex_points:
    def __init__(self, p1, p2, p3, p4):
        self.id_1 = p1
        self.id_2 = p2
        self.id_3 = p3
        self.id_4 = p4
     
class vehicle():
    """
    单帧中的车辆对象
    """
    def __init__(self, class_pred, confidence, track_id, box, frame_counter, video_index=None, pixel_length=None):
        self.class_pred = class_pred
        self.confidence = confidence
        self.track_id = track_id
        self.vertex_points = self._get_sorted_vertex_points(
            box['x1'], box['y1'], box['x2'], box['y2'], 
            box['x3'], box['y3'], box['x4'], box['y4']
        )
        self.frame_counter = frame_counter
        self.video_index = video_index
        self.pixel_length = pixel_length
        
        # 计算中心点
        self.middle_point = position(
            (self.vertex_points.id_1.x + self.vertex_points.id_2.x + 
             self.vertex_points.id_3.x + self.vertex_points.id_4.x) / 4,
            (self.vertex_points.id_1.y + self.vertex_points.id_2.y + 
             self.vertex_points.id_3.y + self.vertex_points.id_4.y) / 4
        )
    
    def _get_sorted_vertex_points(self, x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3, x4, y4):
        """排序顶点并计算长宽"""
        points = np.array([[x1, y1], [x2, y2], [x3, y3], [x4, y4]])
        center = np.mean(points, axis=0)
        vectors = points - center
        angles = np.arctan2(vectors[:, 1], vectors[:, 0])
        sorted_indices = np.argsort(angles)
        sorted_points = points[sorted_indices]
        
        # 分配排序后的顶点
        p1 = position(sorted_points[0][0], sorted_points[0][1])
        p2 = position(sorted_points[1][0], sorted_points[1][1])
        p3 = position(sorted_points[2][0], sorted_points[2][1])
        p4 = position(sorted_points[3][0], sorted_points[3][1])
        vertex = Vertex_points(p1, p2, p3, p4)
        
        # 计算长边和短边
        distances = []
        points_list = [p1, p2, p3, p4]
        for i in range(4):
            j = (i + 1) % 4
            dx = points_list[j].x - points_list[i].x
            dy = points_list[j].y - points_list[i].y
            dist = math.sqrt(dx**2 + dy**2)
            distances.append(dist)
        
        vertex.length = max(distances)
        vertex.width = min(distances)
        return vertex


class vehicle_summary():
    # 统一时间间隔常量
    PIC_TIME_INTERVAL = 1 / 30
    
    def __init__(self, video_index=None, pixel_length=0.076) -> None:
        self.track_id_list = []
        self.class_pred_list = []
        self.frame_list = []  # frame number list
        self.xPosition_list = []  # x position in pixel
        self.yPosition_list = []  # y position in pixel
        self.xPosition_real_list = []
        self.yPosition_real_list = []  # in world coordinate system in meter
        self.width_list_meter = [] 
        self.height_list_meter = []
        self.width_list_pixel = []
        self.height_list_pixel = []
        self.xVelocity_list = []
        self.yVelocity_list = []
        self.xacceration_real_list = []
        self.yacceration_real_list = []
        
        # 角度相关属性
        self.angle_list = []  # 原始角度（0-360度）
        self.angle_denoised_list = []  # 去噪后的角度
        self.angle_filter_list = []  # 滤波后的角度
        self.angle_smooth_list = []  # 平滑后的角度
        self.angular_velocity_list = []  # 角速度序列（度/秒）
        self.angular_acceleration_list = []  # 角加速度序列（度/秒²）
        
        self.vertex_points_list = []
        self.pixel_length = pixel_length
        self.V_direction_list = []  # 速度方向（弧度）
        self.vector_velocity_list = []  # 矢量速度（模长）
        
        # 卡尔曼滤波相关属性
        self.vector_V_pykal = []
        self.V_direction_pykal = []
        self.x_position_pykal_slice = []
        self.y_position_pykal_slice = []
        self.x_velocity_real_list = []
        self.y_velocity_real_list = []
        
        # 新增：用于存储原始位置（L形状优化前）
        self.original_xPosition_list = []
        self.original_yPosition_list = []
        
    def add(self, vehiclex):
        """添加车辆数据"""
        val = True
        vertpts = [vehiclex.vertex_points.id_1, vehiclex.vertex_points.id_2,
                   vehiclex.vertex_points.id_3, vehiclex.vertex_points.id_4]
        
        # 检查是否在图像边界内
        for vertpt in vertpts:
            if vertpt.x < 10 or 3830 < vertpt.x or vertpt.y < 10 or 2150 < vertpt.y:
                val = False
                break
        
        if val:
            self.track_id_list.append(vehiclex.track_id)
            self.class_pred_list.append(vehiclex.class_pred)
            self.frame_list.append(vehiclex.frame_counter)
            self.xPosition_list.append(vehiclex.middle_point.x)
            self.yPosition_list.append(vehiclex.middle_point.y)
            self.xPosition_real_list.append(vehiclex.middle_point.x * self.pixel_length)
            self.yPosition_real_list.append(vehiclex.middle_point.y * self.pixel_length)
            self.width_list_pixel.append(vehiclex.vertex_points.length)
            self.height_list_pixel.append(vehiclex.vertex_points.width)
            self.vertex_points_list.append(vehiclex.vertex_points)
            
            # 统一类别（取众数）
            if len(self.class_pred_list) > 0:
                counter = Counter(self.class_pred_list)
                most_common_class = counter.most_common(1)[0][0]
                self.class_pred_list = [most_common_class] * len(self.class_pred_list)
    
    def judge_noise(self):
        """判断是否为噪声轨迹"""
        if not self.frame_list:
            return False
        if self.frame_list[0] != 0:
            if (200 < self.xPosition_list[0] < 3620 and 
                200 < self.yPosition_list[0] < 1950):
                return True
        return False
    def judge_static(self, movement_threshold=1):
        """判断是否为静止轨迹"""
        x_movement = max(self.xPosition_real_list) - min(self.xPosition_real_list)
        y_movement = max(self.yPosition_real_list) - min(self.yPosition_real_list)
        total_movement = math.sqrt(x_movement**2 + y_movement**2)
        
        return total_movement < movement_threshold
    
    def edge_denoise(self):
        """边缘去噪"""
        width_list = self.width_list_pixel
        height_list = self.height_list_pixel
        
        if len(width_list) == 0:
            return
        
        mid = len(width_list) // 2
        std_width = width_list[mid]
        std_height = height_list[mid]
        
        # 找到有效起始索引
        valid_index = self.frame_list[0]
        for i, frame in enumerate(self.frame_list):
            if width_list[i] > std_width * 0.9 and height_list[i] > std_height * 0.9:
                valid_index = i
                break
        
        # 找到有效结束索引
        valid_end_index = self.frame_list[-1]
        for j in range(len(self.frame_list) - 1, -1, -1):
            if width_list[j] > std_width * 0.9 and height_list[j] > std_height * 0.9:
                valid_end_index = j
                break
        
        # 截取有效数据
        if valid_end_index >= valid_index:
            self.track_id_list = self.track_id_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.width_list_pixel = width_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.height_list_pixel = height_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.frame_list = self.frame_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.xPosition_list = self.xPosition_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.yPosition_list = self.yPosition_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.xPosition_real_list = self.xPosition_real_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.yPosition_real_list = self.yPosition_real_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.vertex_points_list = self.vertex_points_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
            self.class_pred_list = self.class_pred_list[valid_index:valid_end_index + 1]
    
    def Lshape_opt(self):
        """L形状优化"""
        width_list = self.width_list_pixel
        height_list = self.height_list_pixel
        
        if len(width_list) == 0:
            return
        
        # 保存原始位置
        self.original_xPosition_list = self.xPosition_list.copy()
        self.original_yPosition_list = self.yPosition_list.copy()
        
        # 找到距离图像中心最近的帧
        imgcenter_x, imgcenter_y = 1920, 1080
        min_distance = float('inf')
        closest_point_index = 0
        
        for idx, vehicle_points in enumerate(self.vertex_points_list):
            if idx % 30 == 0:  # 每隔30帧检查一次
                center_pt = position(
                    (vehicle_points.id_1.x + vehicle_points.id_3.x) / 2,
                    (vehicle_points.id_1.y + vehicle_points.id_3.y) / 2
                )
                # center_x = self.xPosition_list[idx]
                # center_y = self.yPosition_list[idx]
                distance = math.sqrt(
                    (center_pt.x - imgcenter_x)**2 + (center_pt.y - imgcenter_y)**2
                )
                if distance < min_distance:
                    min_distance = distance
                    closest_point_index = idx
        
        # 使用最近帧的尺寸作为标准
        std_width = width_list[closest_point_index]
        std_height = height_list[closest_point_index]
        std_height = min(30, std_height)
        if self.class_pred_list[0] == 0:
            std_width = min(80, std_width)
        
        self.width_list_pixel = [std_width] * len(width_list)
        self.height_list_pixel = [std_height] * len(height_list)
        width_list_meter = [std_width * self.pixel_length] * len(width_list)
        height_list_meter = [std_height * self.pixel_length] * len(height_list)

        new_xPosition_list = []
        new_yPosition_list = []
        new_angle_list = []
        for id_x, vehicle_points in enumerate(self.vertex_points_list):
            # 提取四个角点的坐标
            
            points = [
                (vehicle_points.id_1.x, vehicle_points.id_1.y),
                (vehicle_points.id_2.x, vehicle_points.id_2.y),
                (vehicle_points.id_3.x, vehicle_points.id_3.y),
                (vehicle_points.id_4.x, vehicle_points.id_4.y)
            ]
            center_x = self.xPosition_list[id_x]
            center_y = self.yPosition_list[id_x]
            # 调用resize_rectangle获取调整后的点和长边向量
            resized_points, long_edge_vector = resize_rectangle(points, std_width, std_height, center_x, center_y)
            
            # 计算新的中心点位置
            new_xPosition_list.append((resized_points[0][0] + resized_points[1][0] + resized_points[2][0]+resized_points[3][0]) / 4)
            new_yPosition_list.append((resized_points[0][1] + resized_points[1][1] + resized_points[2][1]+resized_points[3][1]) / 4)
            # new_yPosition_list.append((resized_points[0][1] + resized_points[2][1]) / 2)
            
            # 更新顶点（修复数据类型问题）
            resized_vertex = Vertex_points(
                position(resized_points[0][0], resized_points[0][1]),
                position(resized_points[1][0], resized_points[1][1]),
                position(resized_points[2][0], resized_points[2][1]),
                position(resized_points[3][0], resized_points[3][1])
            )
            self.vertex_points_list[id_x] = resized_vertex
            
            # 计算车辆朝向角
            # if id_x < len(self.V_direction_list):
            speed_dir_rad = self.V_direction_list[id_x]  # 速度方向（弧度）
            raw_heading_angle = calc_vehicle_heading_angle(long_edge_vector, speed_dir_rad)  # 原始朝向角
            new_angle_list.append(raw_heading_angle)
                # corrected_angle = self._correct_angle_jump(raw_heading_angle, new_angle_list)  # 修正跳变
                # new_angle_list.append(corrected_angle)
            # else:
            #     # 无速度方向时，基于长边方向计算朝向角
            #     dx, dy = long_edge_vector
            #     if dx == 0 and dy == 0:
            #         corrected_angle = 0.0
            #     else:
            #         raw_rad = math.atan2(dy, dx)
            #         raw_deg = math.degrees(raw_rad)
            #         corrected_angle = (360 - (raw_deg % 360)) % 360  # 转为顺时针[0°, 360°)
            #     new_angle_list.append(corrected_angle)
        
        # 更新所有列表
        self.width_list_meter = width_list_meter
        self.height_list_meter = height_list_meter
        self.angle_list = new_angle_list
        self.xPosition_list = new_xPosition_list
        self.yPosition_list = new_yPosition_list
        self.xPosition_real_list = [x * self.pixel_length for x in new_xPosition_list]
        self.yPosition_real_list = [y * self.pixel_length for y in new_yPosition_list]
    
    def _correct_angle_jump(self, current_angle, new_angle_list):
        """
        角度修正v4: 解决朝向角异常跳变，按差值范围修正角度
        核心规则：
        1. 若相邻帧差值 ∈ [90°, 270°] → 当前帧角度 - 180°
        2. 若相邻帧差值 ∈ [-270°, -90°] → 当前帧角度 + 180°
        3. 最终确保角度在 [0°, 360°) 范围内

        参数:
            current_angle: 当前帧的朝向角（度），范围[0°, 360°)
        返回:
            修正后的朝向角（度），范围[0°, 360°)
        """
        if len(new_angle_list) == 0:
            # 第一帧，无需修正，直接返回并确保范围
            return current_angle % 360

        # 获取上一帧修正后的角度（已在0~360°范围内）
        prev_angle = new_angle_list[-1]

        # 计算原始差值（未归一化，保留360°循环的原始差）
        raw_diff = current_angle - prev_angle

        # 核心逻辑：根据原始差值范围修正当前角度
        corrected_angle = current_angle  # 初始化默认值为原始角度
        if 90 <= raw_diff <= 270:
            # 差值在[90°, 270°] → 当前帧角度减180°
            corrected_angle = current_angle - 180
        elif -270 <= raw_diff <= -90:
            # 差值在[-270°, -90°] → 当前帧角度加180°
            corrected_angle = current_angle + 180

        # 确保修正后的角度落在[0°, 360°)范围内
        corrected_angle = corrected_angle % 360

        return corrected_angle
    
    def set_velocity_list(self):
        """计算速度"""
        # 空值检查
        if not self.xPosition_real_list:
            self.xVelocity_list = [0]
            self.yVelocity_list = [0]
            self.vector_velocity_list = [0]
            self.V_direction_list = [0]
            return
        
        if len(self.xPosition_real_list) > 5:
            self.xVelocity_list = slice_window(self.xPosition_real_list)
            self.yVelocity_list = slice_window(self.yPosition_real_list)
        elif len(self.xPosition_real_list) > 2:
            self.xVelocity_list = []
            self.yVelocity_list = []
            for i in range(1, len(self.xPosition_real_list)):
                self.xVelocity_list.append(
                    (self.xPosition_real_list[i] - self.xPosition_real_list[i-1]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
                )
                self.yVelocity_list.append(
                    (self.yPosition_real_list[i] - self.yPosition_real_list[i-1]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
                )
            self.xVelocity_list.insert(0, self.xVelocity_list[0] if len(self.xVelocity_list) > 0 else 0)
            self.yVelocity_list.insert(0, self.yVelocity_list[0] if len(self.yVelocity_list) > 0 else 0)
        elif len(self.xPosition_real_list) > 1:
            self.xVelocity_list = [0]
            self.yVelocity_list = [0]
            self.xVelocity_list.append(
                (self.xPosition_real_list[1] - self.xPosition_real_list[0]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
            )
            self.yVelocity_list.append(
                (self.yPosition_real_list[1] - self.yPosition_real_list[0]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
            )
        else:
            self.xVelocity_list = [0]
            self.yVelocity_list = [0]
        
        # 计算矢量速度和方向
        self.vector_velocity_list = []
        self.V_direction_list = []
        # 对 self.xVelocity_list 和 self.yVelocity_list 所有元素保留一位小数
        self.xVelocity_list = [round(vx, 1) for vx in self.xVelocity_list]
        self.yVelocity_list = [round(vy, 1) for vy in self.yVelocity_list]
        #针对存在的四舍五入的造成的异常值，进行中值滤波处理
        self.xVelocity_list = median_filter(self.xVelocity_list)
        self.yVelocity_list = median_filter(self.yVelocity_list)

        for vx, vy in zip(self.xVelocity_list, self.yVelocity_list):
            v = math.sqrt(vx**2 + vy**2)  # 勾股定理计算矢量速度
            self.vector_velocity_list.append(v)
            # 计算运动方向，夹角θ（弧度）
            theta = math.atan2(vy, vx)
            #如果 vx 和 vy 都为 0，则使用上一个非零方向
            if vx == 0 and vy == 0:
                if len(self.V_direction_list) > 0:
                    theta = self.V_direction_list[-1]
                else:
                    theta = 0.0
            self.V_direction_list.append(theta)
    
    def set_velocity_kalman_filter(self):
        """速度卡尔曼滤波"""
        self.vector_V_pykal = []
        self.V_direction_pykal = []
        
        try:
            if len(self.xPosition_real_list) > 2:
                return_list = velocity_kalman_filter(
                    self.xPosition_real_list, self.yPosition_real_list,
                    self.xVelocity_list, self.yVelocity_list
                )
                self.x_position_pykal_slice = return_list[0]
                self.y_position_pykal_slice = return_list[1]
                self.x_velocity_real_list = return_list[2]
                self.y_velocity_real_list = return_list[3]
            else:
                self.x_position_pykal_slice = self.xPosition_real_list
                self.y_position_pykal_slice = self.yPosition_real_list
                self.x_velocity_real_list = self.xVelocity_list
                self.y_velocity_real_list = self.yVelocity_list
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"速度卡尔曼滤波失败: {e}")
            self.x_position_pykal_slice = self.xPosition_real_list
            self.y_position_pykal_slice = self.yPosition_real_list
            self.x_velocity_real_list = self.xVelocity_list
            self.y_velocity_real_list = self.yVelocity_list
        
        # 更新像素坐标
        self.xPosition_list_update = [x / self.pixel_length for x in self.x_position_pykal_slice]
        self.yPosition_list_update = [y / self.pixel_length for y in self.y_position_pykal_slice]
        
        # 计算滤波后的矢量速度和方向
        for vx, vy in zip(self.x_velocity_real_list, self.y_velocity_real_list):
            v = math.sqrt(vx**2 + vy**2)
            self.vector_V_pykal.append(v)
            theta = math.atan2(vy, vx)
            self.V_direction_pykal.append(theta)
    
    def set_acceration_list(self):
        """计算加速度"""
        self.xacceration_real_list = []
        self.yacceration_real_list = []
        
        vel_x_len = len(self.x_velocity_real_list)
        vel_y_len = len(self.y_velocity_real_list)
        
        # x方向加速度
        if vel_x_len > 5:
            self.xacceration_real_list = slice_window(self.x_velocity_real_list)
        elif vel_x_len > 2:
            for i in range(1, vel_x_len):
                acc = (self.x_velocity_real_list[i] - self.x_velocity_real_list[i-1]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
                self.xacceration_real_list.append(acc)
            self.xacceration_real_list.insert(0, self.xacceration_real_list[0] if len(self.xacceration_real_list) > 0 else 0)
        elif vel_x_len > 1:
            self.xacceration_real_list.append(0)
            acc = (self.x_velocity_real_list[1] - self.x_velocity_real_list[0]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
            self.xacceration_real_list.append(acc)
        else:
            self.xacceration_real_list.append(0)
        
        # y方向加速度
        if vel_y_len > 5:
            self.yacceration_real_list = slice_window(self.y_velocity_real_list)
        elif vel_y_len > 2:
            for i in range(1, vel_y_len):
                acc = (self.y_velocity_real_list[i] - self.y_velocity_real_list[i-1]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
                self.yacceration_real_list.append(acc)
            self.yacceration_real_list.insert(0, self.yacceration_real_list[0] if len(self.yacceration_real_list) > 0 else 0)
        elif vel_y_len > 1:
            self.yacceration_real_list.append(0)
            acc = (self.y_velocity_real_list[1] - self.y_velocity_real_list[0]) / self.PIC_TIME_INTERVAL
            self.yacceration_real_list.append(acc)
        else:
            self.yacceration_real_list.append(0)
    
    def set_angle_filter(self):
        """
        角度滤波
        使用postprocess_tools.py中的angle_filter函数
        """
        if len(self.angle_list) < 2:
            # 如果数据太少，直接使用修正后的角度
            self.angle_denoised_list = self.angle_list
            self.angle_filter_list = self.angle_list
            self.angle_smooth_list = self.angle_list
            self.angular_velocity_list = [0] * len(self.angle_list)
            self.angular_acceleration_list = [0] * len(self.angle_list)
        else:
            try:
                # 调用角度滤波函数
                angle_denoised, angles_filter, angles_smooth, angular_velocity, angular_acceleration = angle_filter(self.angle_list)
                self.angle_denoised_list = angle_denoised
                self.angle_filter_list = angles_filter
                self.angle_smooth_list = angles_smooth
                self.angular_velocity_list = angular_velocity
                self.angular_acceleration_list = angular_acceleration
                
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"角度滤波失败: {e}")
                self.angle_denoised_list = self.angle_list
                self.angle_filter_list = self.angle_list
                self.angle_smooth_list = self.angle_list
                self.angular_velocity_list = [0] * len(self.angle_list)
                self.angular_acceleration_list = [0] * len(self.angle_list)



class Postprocesser():
    def __init__(self, tracks_json_path, output_csv_path, pixel_per_meter=0.076,consider_static_objects=False):
        self.tracks_json_path = tracks_json_path
        self.output_csv_path = output_csv_path
        self.pixel_per_meter = pixel_per_meter
        self.consider_static_objects = consider_static_objects
        self.skip_process = False
        self.update = True
    
    def data_parser(self):
        """解析原始跟踪数据"""
        with open(self.tracks_json_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            data = json.load(f)
        
        vehicle_summary_dict = {}
        for frame_data in tqdm(data, desc="解析帧数据"):
            vehicle_dict = {}
            for obj in frame_data['box_info']:
                # 调试用 只处理特定track_id
                # if obj['track_id'] not in [5, 16, 28, 71, 75, 290]:
                #     continue
                if 'track_id' not in obj.keys():
                    continue
                
                vehicle_current_frame = vehicle(
                    obj['class'], obj['confidence'], obj['track_id'],
                    obj['box'], frame_data['frame']
                )
                vehicle_dict[str(obj['track_id'])] = vehicle_current_frame
            
            for track_id, vehiclex in vehicle_dict.items():
                if track_id not in vehicle_summary_dict.keys():
                    vehicle_summary_new = vehicle_summary(pixel_length=self.pixel_per_meter)
                    vehicle_summary_new.add(vehiclex)
                    vehicle_summary_dict[track_id] = vehicle_summary_new
                else:
                    vehicle_summary_dict[track_id].add(vehiclex)
        
        self.vehicle_summary_dict = vehicle_summary_dict
        print(f'解析完成：从 {self.tracks_json_path} 解析出 {len(self.vehicle_summary_dict)} 个车辆轨迹')
    
    def pre_optimize(self):
        """预优化：插值补全缺失帧"""
        if not hasattr(self, 'vehicle_summary_dict'):
            print("未找到vehicle_summary_dict，无法优化")
            return
        
        for track_id, vehicle_obj in self.vehicle_summary_dict.items():
            self.vehicle_summary_dict[track_id] = interpolate_vehicle(vehicle_obj)
        
        print(f"预优化完成，共处理 {len(self.vehicle_summary_dict)} 个车辆轨迹")
    
    def Lshape_KLF(self):
        """L形状优化和滤波"""
        if self.skip_process:
            return  
        
        new_summary_dict = {}
        for track_id, vehicle_summaryx in tqdm(self.vehicle_summary_dict.items(), desc="后处理", unit='车辆'):
            # 过滤过短轨迹  
            if len(vehicle_summaryx.frame_list) < 30:
                continue
            if not self.consider_static_objects:
                if vehicle_summaryx.judge_static(movement_threshold=2):
                    continue
            # if track_id != '75':
            #     continue
                
            # 执行优化步骤（按正确顺序）
            vehicle_summaryx.edge_denoise()  # 1. 边缘去噪
            vehicle_summaryx.set_velocity_list()  # 2. 先计算速度方向（使用原始位置）
            vehicle_summaryx.Lshape_opt()  # 3. L形状优化（使用速度方向计算角度）
            vehicle_summaryx.set_velocity_kalman_filter()  # 4. 重新计算速度（基于L形状优化后的位置）
            vehicle_summaryx.set_acceration_list()  # 5. 计算加速度
            vehicle_summaryx.set_angle_filter()  # 6. 角度滤波
            
            new_summary_dict[track_id] = vehicle_summaryx
        
        self.vehicle_summary_dict = new_summary_dict
    
    def save_csv(self):
        """保存为CSV文件"""
        if self.skip_process:
            return
        
        # 使用dataframe保存为CSV
        all_data = []
        for track_id, vehicle_summaryx in self.vehicle_summary_dict.items():
            # 确保所有列表长度一致
            frame_count = len(vehicle_summaryx.frame_list)
            
            # 构建数据字典
            data_dict = {
                'track_id': vehicle_summaryx.track_id_list,
                'class_pred': vehicle_summaryx.class_pred_list,
                'frame': vehicle_summaryx.frame_list,
                'xPosition_pixel': vehicle_summaryx.xPosition_list_update,
                'yPosition_pixel': vehicle_summaryx.yPosition_list_update,
                'xPosition_meter': vehicle_summaryx.x_position_pykal_slice,
                'yPosition_meter': vehicle_summaryx.y_position_pykal_slice,
                'width_pixel': vehicle_summaryx.width_list_pixel,
                'height_pixel': vehicle_summaryx.height_list_pixel,
                'width_meter': vehicle_summaryx.width_list_meter,
                'height_meter': vehicle_summaryx.height_list_meter,
                'xVelocity_meter_per_s': vehicle_summaryx.x_velocity_real_list,
                'yVelocity_meter_per_s': vehicle_summaryx.y_velocity_real_list,
                'xAcceleration_meter_per_s2': vehicle_summaryx.xacceration_real_list,
                'yAcceleration_meter_per_s2': vehicle_summaryx.yacceration_real_list,
                'angle_degree': vehicle_summaryx.angle_list,  # 原始角度（0-360度）
                'angle_degree_denoised': vehicle_summaryx.angle_denoised_list,  # 去噪后的角度
                'angle_degree_filter': vehicle_summaryx.angle_filter_list,  # 滤波后的角度
                'angle_degree_smooth': vehicle_summaryx.angle_smooth_list,  # 平滑后的角度
                'angular_velocity': vehicle_summaryx.angular_velocity_list,
                'angular_acceleration': vehicle_summaryx.angular_acceleration_list,
                'velocity_magnitude': vehicle_summaryx.vector_V_pykal,
                'velocity_direction_rad': vehicle_summaryx.V_direction_pykal,
            }
            
            # 统一列表长度
            for key, val in data_dict.items():
                # print(f"Track ID {track_id}: {key} 列长度 = {len(val)}")
                if len(val) < frame_count:
                    data_dict[key] = val + [val[-1]] * (frame_count - len(val))
                elif len(val) > frame_count:
                    data_dict[key] = val[:frame_count]
            
            df = pd.DataFrame(data_dict)
            all_data.append(df)
        
        if all_data:
            result_df = pd.concat(all_data, ignore_index=True)
            result_df.to_csv(self.output_csv_path, index=False)
            print(f"结果已保存到: {self.output_csv_path}")
            # print(f"CSV包含 {len(result_df.columns)} 列，包含 angle_degree 和 angle_degree_kf 列")
        else:
            print("警告：没有有效数据可保存")


class data_optimizer():
    def __init__(self, csv_path, out_path):
        self.csv_file_pd = pd.read_csv(csv_path)
        self.out_path = out_path
    
    def pedestrain_opt(self):
        mask = self.csv_file_pd['class_pred'] == 3
        self.csv_file_pd.loc[mask, ['width_pixel', 'height_pixel']] = 10
    
    def frame_opt(self):
        """保证帧是连续的，如果存在断帧，则需要进行插值补齐"""
        # 按track_id分组处理
        track_groups = self.csv_file_pd.groupby('track_id')
        new_dfs = []
        
        for track_id, group in tqdm(track_groups, desc="补全缺失帧", unit="track"):
            # 排序帧
            group = group.sort_values('frame')
            min_frame = group['frame'].min()
            max_frame = group['frame'].max()
            
            # 生成完整帧列表
            full_frames = pd.DataFrame({'frame': range(min_frame, max_frame + 1)})
            # 合并并插值
            merged = full_frames.merge(group, on='frame', how='left')
            merged['track_id'] = track_id
            
            # 插值数值列
            numeric_cols = [
                'xPosition_pixel', 'yPosition_pixel', 'xPosition_meter', 'yPosition_meter',
                'width_pixel', 'height_pixel', 'width_meter', 'height_meter',
                'xVelocity_meter_per_s', 'yVelocity_meter_per_s',
                'xacceration_meter_per_s2', 'yacceration_meter_per_s2',
                'angle_degree', 'angle_degree_kf', 'angular_velocity', 'angular_acceleration',
                'velocity_magnitude', 'velocity_direction_rad'
            ]
            for col in numeric_cols:
                if col in merged.columns:
                    merged[col] = merged[col].interpolate(method='linear').fillna(method='bfill').fillna(method='ffill')
            
            # 填充类别
            if 'class_pred' in merged.columns:
                merged['class_pred'] = merged['class_pred'].fillna(method='ffill').fillna(method='bfill')
            
            new_dfs.append(merged)
        
        self.csv_file_pd = pd.concat(new_dfs, ignore_index=True)
    
    def orientation_opt(self):
        """利用15帧后的位置来修正当前的角度"""
        frame_gp = self.csv_file_pd.groupby('frame')
        frame_ids = sorted(frame_gp.groups.keys())  # 排序帧ID
        
        for frame_idx, group in tqdm(frame_gp, desc="orientation_opt", unit="frame"):
            future_frame = frame_idx + 15
            if future_frame not in frame_gp.groups:
                continue
            
            future_group = frame_gp.get_group(future_frame)
            for idx, row in group.iterrows():
                track_id = row['track_id']
                future_rows = future_group[future_group['track_id'] == track_id]
                if future_rows.empty:
                    continue
                
                future_row = future_rows.iloc[0]
                current_x = row['xPosition_pixel']
                current_y = row['yPosition_pixel']
                future_x = future_row['xPosition_pixel']
                future_y = future_row['yPosition_pixel']
                
                dx = future_x - current_x
                dy = future_y - current_y
                if dx == 0 and dy == 0:
                    continue
                
                # 计算朝向角（顺时针[0°, 360°)）
                new_angle_rad = math.atan2(dy, dx)
                new_angle_deg = math.degrees(new_angle_rad)
                new_angle_deg = (360 - (new_angle_deg % 360)) % 360
                self.csv_file_pd.at[idx, 'angle_degree'] = new_angle_deg
    
    def save_optimized_csv(self):
        """保存优化后的CSV"""
        self.csv_file_pd.to_csv(self.out_path, index=False)
        print(f"优化后的数据已保存到: {self.out_path}")
